meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve slow development speed (Intermediate Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome slow development speed. A Intermediate-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Antigravity Template: Accelerate Your Freelance Dev Workflow
content.seo_description: Stop wasting hours on boilerplate. Use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to ship high-quality client apps at record speed. Intermediate guide.
content.answer_block: To eliminate slow development, leverage the Antigravity project template to standardize your architecture and automate boilerplate. By pairing this with Claude Code, you transform manual coding into an iterative, AI-driven pipeline. This workflow slashes setup time by 80%, allowing you to focus on unique business logic instead of infrastructure.
content.intro:
You know the feeling: the client needs a production-ready MVP by Friday, but you’re still stuck wrestling with configuration files, environment variables, and project scaffolding. Every hour spent on boilerplate is an hour you aren't shipping, and more importantly, an hour you aren't billing. The gap between a prototype and a scalable product is filled with repetitive, soul-crushing setup tasks that drain your creative momentum.

But what if your development environment was already optimized for speed from the first keystroke? Enter the Antigravity project template. It is designed for the high-velocity freelancer who needs to move from concept to deployment without the friction of manual configuration. When combined with the raw power of Claude Code, you don't just write code—you orchestrate architecture.

steps.title: Initialize the Foundation
steps.description: Clone the Antigravity template to establish a battle-tested architecture that handles authentication and database ORM out of the box.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a new project using the base Antigravity template, ensuring standard TypeScript configuration and modular folder structures for a SaaS application.

steps.title: Configure Domain Logic
steps.description: Use Claude Code to map your specific client requirements onto the existing Antigravity structure to avoid reinventing the wheel.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Map the following client requirements to the Antigravity project structure: [Insert Requirements]. Create necessary DTOs and service layers.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Refactor the service layer to support the new domain model defined in the prompt'

steps.title: Automate API Endpoints
steps.description: Instead of manual coding, use the template's internal generators to create robust, type-safe API routes.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate CRUD endpoints for the User and Project entities using the Antigravity controller pattern.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Generate controllers and routes for User and Project entities'

steps.title: Implement Middleware and Security
steps.description: Leverage Antigravity's pre-configured security middleware to secure your endpoints without writing boilerplate security logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Apply JWT authentication middleware to all routes except the public landing page and auth endpoints.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Apply auth middleware to the router'

steps.title: Deploy via CI/CD Pipeline
steps.description: Use the built-in deployment scripts to push your build to production, ensuring zero-downtime releases.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure the deployment workflow for AWS/Vercel using the Antigravity standard deployment script.

pro_tips: Always define your business entities in a shared constants file before running the generator to ensure type consistency across the frontend and backend.
Use Claude Code's memory feature to store your 'coding style' preferences so the generated code consistently matches your architectural standards.
Run the Antigravity linter immediately after every AI generation to catch potential edge-case errors before they compound.
Leverage the template's built-in 'mock-data' generator to test your UI components while the backend is still being finalized.
Alias your most common Claude Code commands to 2-character shortcuts in your terminal to save minutes of typing every hour.
content.next_steps: Once your first project is live, iterate by creating your own custom sub-templates within Antigravity to further optimize your specific niche workflows.
content.conversion_block: Stop building from scratch and start scaling your freelance business with an AI-first approach. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
